da.hero_subtitle: Semi-intensiv certificering i København — balanceret tempo, professionel dybde, plads til hverdagen
da.hero_styles: Hatha · Vinyasa · Yin · Hot Yoga & Meditation
da.video_title: Hør fra en, der har gjort det
da.video_subtitle: Rigtige studerende, rigtige oplevelser — direkte fra vores studie i Christianshavn.
da.cert_subtitle: En internationalt anerkendt certificering, der åbner døre — uanset om du vil undervise i København, på Bali eller online fra din stue.
da.cert_style1_desc: Den klassiske form — grundlaget for al yogaundervisning. Styrker balance, fokus og koncentration.
da.cert_style2_desc: Verdens mest populære stil — dynamisk, kreativ og den mest efterspurgte i studier og fitnesscentre overalt.
da.cert_style3_desc: Lange stræk og dyb restitution. Idéel til at guide elever i ro, tålmodighed og indre balance.
da.cert_style4_desc: Undervis i opvarmet miljø. Du lærer forskellen på heated og non-heated undervisning.
da.cert_style5_desc: Guide dine elever sikkert gennem meditation og åndedrætsøvelser — uundværligt for professionel undervisning.
da.cert_career1_text: certificeringen er anerkendt globalt. Underviser du i Berlin, Bangkok eller Brooklyn, er du dækket ind.
da.cert_career2_text: med RYT-200 kan du oprette egne klasser, workshops og retreats med kvalitetsstempel bag dig.
da.cert_career3_text: med erfaring kan du oprette din egen skole via Yoga Alliance og uddanne kommende lærere.
da.cert_career4_text: fortsæt til 300-timers avanceret program for endnu større dybde og ekspertise.
da.cert_career5_text: fra yogastudier og fitnesscentre til corporate wellness, retreats og online undervisning.
da.cert_closing: En solid base til at undervise enhver yogastil — og en dør til karrieremuligheder du måske ikke havde forestillet dig.
da.certval_title: Mere end et certifikat — en livslang investering
da.certval_intro: RYT-200 er indgangen til yogaundervisning på alle niveauer. En certificering, der forandrer både din praksis og dit perspektiv — personligt og professionelt.
da.certval_learn1: Undervis i verdens mest populære og grundlæggende yogastile — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga og Meditation
da.certval_learn2: Menneskekroppens anatomi og fysiologi — forstå bevægelse, muskler og skeletstruktur
da.certval_learn3: Yogafilosofi og meditationsteknikker — fra de klassiske tekster til moderne anvendelse
da.certval_learn4: Forbedr din egen praksis, undgå skader og lær at hele eksisterende ubalancer
da.certval_learn5: Personlig transformation og professionel udvikling — en investering i noget meningsfuldt
da.certval_upgrade_text: Din RYT-200 er fundamentet. Derfra kan du udvide med målrettede kurser (Inversions, Splits, Backbends) eller tage det fulde spring med vores 300-timers Advanced Teacher Training til RYT-500.
da.certval_exam_text: Du demonstrerer dine færdigheder ved at undervise op til 20 minutters sekvenser i hver stil for dit hold. Derudover skal du bestå tests og quizzer i anatomi og yogafilosofi. Ingen overraskelser — vi forbereder dig grundigt.
da.certval_image_alt: Eksempel på Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certificering
da.compare_subtitle: Du kan tage din yogalæreruddannelse mange steder i verden. Her er hvad der gør København til et stærkt valg — uanset om du allerede bor her eller rejser hertil.
da.approach1_desc: Intimt hold hvor alle kender hinanden. Individuel feedback og personlig opmærksomhed fra dag ét.
da.approach2_desc: Erfarne lærere med global baggrund — professionelle, tilgængelige og dedikerede til din udvikling.
da.approach3_desc: To studiemiljøer: heated og non-heated rum med bruse, omklædning og alt udstyr inkluderet.
da.approach4_desc: Du lærer Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga og Meditation — underviser i alle stilarter med samme certificering.
da.approach5_desc: Ikke bare yoga — du lærer class management, cueing, business basics og hvordan du rent faktisk starter som underviser.
da.approach6_desc: 8 uger giver dig tid til at absorbere stoffet, øve dig mellem sessionerne og stadig have plads til hverdagen.
da.approach7_desc: Gratis adgang til alle klasser i studiet under hele uddannelsen — øv dig på egen hånd mellem workshops.
da.approach8_desc: Bliv en del af 500+ dimittender globalt. Livslang support, community events og muligheder for videre samarbejde.
da.cph_subtitle: Uanset om du bor i København eller rejser hertil for uddannelsen — du træner i en af verdens mest inspirerende byer. Professionelt studie, fantastisk infrastruktur og et livsstilsmiljø der beriger din praksis.
da.cph_feat1_desc: Byen er bygget til cykler — dedikerede baner, cykellyskryds og mere frihed end en bil nogensinde giver.
da.cph_feat2_desc: World-class kaffebarer på hvert hjørne — perfekt til at studere anatomi, journalisere eller bare nyde en pause.
da.cph_feat3_desc: Nordiske saunaritualer med aufguss-mestre — varme, åndedræt og community. Det perfekte supplement til din praksis.
da.cph_feat4_desc: Havnebade og udendørs svømning året rundt. Mange yogier integrerer kuldeeksponering i deres daglige routine.
da.cph_feat5_desc: Hjemsted for det ny nordiske køkken. Street food, Torvehallerne, Michelin-restauranter — friskt, sæsonbetonet og plantebaseret.
da.cph_feat6_desc: Fra møbler til arkitektur — skønhed i enhver detalje af hverdagslivet. UNESCOs World Capital of Architecture.
da.cph_studio_desc: Vores studie ligger i en af Christianshavns ældste bygninger — over 400 år gammel. Centralt beliggende med metro, restauranter og grønne områder i gåafstand.
da.visit_title: Book en gratis rundvisning i Christianshavn
da.visit_lead: Kom forbi og mærk stemningen — vi viser dig rundt, svarer på alt og hjælper dig med at finde ud af, om det er det rigtige for dig. Rundvisningen tager ca. 20 minutter.
da.visit_list1: Se lokaler, udstyr og roen i huset
da.visit_list3: Få en klar plan for næste skridt
da.visit_note: Bor du ikke i København? Vi kan også lave en kort video-rundvisning via WhatsApp eller FaceTime — perfekt for internationale studerende.
da.visit_modal_subtitle: Vælg en dato og et tidspunkt der passer dig.
da.reviews_title: 500+ dimittender — og de er ret begejstrede
da.reviews_lead: Internationale og lokale studerende deler deres oplevelse. Fra karriereskift til personlig transformation — uddannelsen har ændret livet for 500+ mennesker.
da.quote_text: Probably the best thing I have ever done for myself
da.format_subtitle: 8 uger med 3–4 undervisningsdage per uge. Mere fordybende end vores 18-ugers format, men med luft til hverdagen — ikke det daglige pres fra et 4-ugers intensivt forløb.
da.format_card1_desc: Hverdage typisk kl. 10:00–17:00, udvalgte weekender kl. 09:00–17:00. Gennemsnitligt 15–18 timer/uge inkl. selvpraksis og hjemmearbejde.
da.format_card2_desc: Intimt hold hvor du bliver set og hørt. Individuel feedback, personlig vejledning og et community der bærer dig.
da.format_card3_desc: Du kan arbejde deltid ved siden af. Tempoet giver dig tid til at integrere og praktisere det du lærer mellem sessionerne.
da.cohort_lead: Vi tilbyder det 8-ugers semi-intensive program to gange i 2026. Begge hold giver identisk Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certificering og følger det samme curriculum.
da.may_desc: Forårsholdet — start din rejse mens byen blomstrer. Lange lyse dage, udendørsliv og en fantastisk energi i København.
da.june_desc: Sommerholdet — København på sit bedste. Havnebade, lyse aftener og den bedste tid at opleve byen ved siden af din uddannelse.
da.week_desc: Man–Tir: Workshop (anatomi, asana, undervisning) → Ons: Fri — selvpraksis eller hverdagsliv → Tor–Fre: Workshop (filosofi, pranayama, praksis) → Weekend: Blanding af praksis og frihed.
da.cohort_point1: 200+ timer fordelt over 8 uger med balanceret tempo
da.cohort_point3: Perfekt til dedikerede 2 måneder — lokalt eller som rejsende
da.cohort_scenario1_text: 8-ugers formatet er ideelt til dig, der bor i byen og vil gennemføre uddannelsen i et fokuseret men balanceret tempo. Du kan bevare deltidsarbejde og sociale forpligtelser.
da.cohort_scenario2_text: Mange studerende rejser hertil for uddannelsen. Vi hjælper med indkvartering tæt på studiet, og 8 uger giver dig god tid til at opleve byen som mere end en turist.
da.cohort_cta_hint: Vil du se de præcise datoer?
da.rooms_subtitle: For studerende der rejser til København, tilbyder vi møblerede boliger i gåafstand fra studiet i Christianshavn.
da.room1_desc: Fuldt møbleret privat lejlighed. Roligt, rent og praktisk — alt du behøver i 8 uger. Gåafstand til studiet.
da.room2_desc: Privat værelse i en 2-værelses lejlighed. Delt køkken og bad — perfekt til at møde medstuderende og skabe nye venskaber.
da.rooms_cta_text: Læs mere om bolig og livet i København →
da.invest_include3: Praksis i professionelt studie — heated + non-heated
da.invest_payment_note: Forberedelsesfasen på 3.750 kr. er inkluderet i den samlede pris. Restbeløb: 21.750 kr. Fuldt refunderbar, uden betingelser.
da.invest_ya_note: Yoga Alliance-bekræftelse udstedes først, når alle gebyrer er betalt fuldt ud.
da.early_title: Ansøg tidligt — og begynd at praktisere med det samme
da.early_subtitle: Forberedelsesfasen sikrer din plads og giver øjeblikkelig adgang til alle klasser i studiet.
da.early_list1: Sikr din plads — max 12 per hold
da.early_list2: Book og deltag i klasser med det samme
da.early_list3: Forbered krop og sind inden uddannelsen starter
da.early_cta_text: Start forberedelsesfasen og begynd at booke
da.faq1_q: Skal jeg have erfaring for at starte?
da.faq1_a: Du bør have minimum 6–12 måneders regelmæssig yogapraksis (2–3 gange om ugen). Du skal være fortrolig med basale stillinger og kunne holde en 60-minutters klasse. Ingen undervisningserfaring er nødvendig.
da.faq2_a: Regn med ca. 15–18 timer om ugen, inkl. undervisning (3–4 dage), hjemmeopgaver, selvpraksis og forberedelse. Mere fordybende end 18-ugers, men med luft mellem sessionerne sammenlignet med det daglige 4-ugers format.
da.faq3_q: Kan jeg arbejde ved siden af?
da.faq3_a: Ja, deltid. Programmet er designet, så du kan bevare en deltidsbeskæftigelse. Mange studerende kombinerer uddannelsen med 15–20 timers arbejde om ugen.
da.faq4_q: Kan I hjælpe med bolig i København?
da.faq4_a: Ja — vi tilbyder møblerede lejligheder tæt på studiet for internationale studerende og kursister, der rejser til København. Fra 6.500 kr. inkl. alt.
da.faq5_q: Jeg bor ikke i Danmark — er det relevant for mig?
da.faq5_a: Absolut. Mange af vores studerende rejser hertil fra udlandet. Undervisningen er på dansk og engelsk, vi hjælper med bolig, og København er en af verdens sikreste og mest liveable byer.
da.faq6_a: Uddannelsen er 25.500 kr. alt inkluderet. Bolig, mad og transport er ekstra. Regn med ca. 8.000–14.000 kr./måned for leveomkostninger i København.
da.faq7_q: Hvad sker der, hvis jeg bliver syg?
da.faq7_a: Du må maks. misse 10% af timerne. Vi tilbyder make-up sessions, og i yderste konsekvens kan du færdiggøre med næste hold.
da.faq8_a: Ja, vi er en registreret Yoga Alliance skole (RYS-200). Du modtager RYT-200 certificering efter graduation — anerkendt globalt.
da.faq9_q: Hvad er forskellen på 8-ugers og de andre formater?
da.faq9_a: Alle tre formater (4, 8 og 18 uger) giver identisk Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certificering. 8-ugers er mere fordybende end 18-ugers, men med bedre balance end det daglige 4-ugers intensive program. Ideelt for dig, der kan afsætte 2 fokuserede måneder.
da.final_text: Næste hold starter Maj 2026 — max 12 pladser. Få skemaet og tag det første skridt.
da.more_lead: Hos Yoga Bible tilbyder vi forløb, der hjælper dig videre i din praksis – fra målrettede kursusforløb til fleksible læreruddannelser.
da.courses_desc: Vi afholder hver måned fokuserede 4-ugers forløb pakket som 8 × 90 minutters workshops (to gange om ugen) – til en rimelig pris og designet til alle, der vil fordybe deres praksis trin for trin.

en.hero_subtitle: Semi-intensive certification in Copenhagen — balanced pace, professional depth, room for everyday life
en.hero_styles: Hatha · Vinyasa · Yin · Hot Yoga & Meditation
en.hero_cta_more: Read details about our 200-hour yoga teacher training →
en.video_title: Hear from someone who did it
en.video_subtitle: Real students, real experiences — straight from our studio in Christianshavn.
en.cert_subtitle: An internationally recognized certification that opens doors — whether you want to teach in Copenhagen, Bali, or online from your living room.
en.cert_style1_desc: The classical form — the foundation of all yoga teaching. Builds balance, focus, and concentration.
en.cert_style2_desc: The world's most popular style — dynamic, creative, and the most in-demand at studios and fitness centres everywhere.
en.cert_style3_desc: Long holds and deep restoration. Ideal for guiding students in stillness, patience, and inner balance.
en.cert_style4_desc: Teach in a heated environment. You'll learn the difference between heated and non-heated instruction.
en.cert_style5_desc: Guide your students safely through meditation and breathwork — essential for professional teaching.
en.cert_career1_text: the certification is recognized globally. Whether you teach in Berlin, Bangkok, or Brooklyn, you're covered.
en.cert_career2_text: with RYT-200 you can create your own classes, workshops, and retreats with a quality stamp behind you.
en.cert_career3_text: with experience you can create your own school through Yoga Alliance and train the next generation.
en.cert_career4_text: advance to the 300-hour program for even greater depth and expertise.
en.cert_career5_text: from yoga studios and fitness centres to corporate wellness, retreats, and online teaching.
en.cert_closing: A solid foundation for teaching any yoga style — and a door to career opportunities you might not have imagined.
en.certval_title: More than a certificate — a lifelong investment
en.certval_intro: RYT-200 is the entry point for yoga teaching at all levels. A certification that transforms both your practice and your perspective — personally and professionally.
en.certval_learn1: Teach the world's most popular and foundational yoga styles — Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga & Meditation
en.certval_learn2: Human anatomy and physiology — understand movement, muscles, and skeletal structure
en.certval_learn3: Yoga philosophy and meditation techniques — from classical texts to modern application
en.certval_learn4: Improve your own practice, avoid injuries, and learn to heal existing imbalances
en.certval_learn5: Personal transformation and professional development — an investment in something meaningful
en.certval_upgrade_text: Your RYT-200 is the foundation. From there, you can expand with targeted courses (Inversions, Splits, Backbends) or take the full leap with our 300-Hour Advanced Teacher Training towards RYT-500.
en.certval_exam_text: You'll demonstrate your skills by teaching up to 20-minute sequences in each style to your group. You'll also pass tests and quizzes on anatomy and yoga philosophy. No surprises — we prepare you thoroughly.
en.compare_subtitle: You can do your yoga teacher training in many places around the world. Here's what makes Copenhagen a strong choice — whether you already live here or are traveling in.
en.approach1_desc: An intimate group where everyone knows each other. Individual feedback and personal attention from day one.
en.approach2_desc: Experienced teachers with global backgrounds — professional, approachable, and dedicated to your growth.
en.approach3_desc: Two studio environments: heated and non-heated rooms with showers, changing rooms, and all equipment included.
en.approach4_desc: You'll learn Hatha, Vinyasa, Yin, Hot Yoga, and Meditation — teach all styles with the same certification.
en.approach5_desc: Not just yoga — you'll learn class management, cueing, business basics, and how to actually start as an instructor.
en.approach6_desc: 8 weeks gives you time to absorb the material, practice between sessions, and still have room for everyday life.
en.approach7_desc: Free access to all classes at the studio throughout the entire training — practice on your own between workshops.
en.approach8_desc: Join 500+ graduates worldwide. Lifelong support, community events, and opportunities for continued collaboration.
en.cph_subtitle: Whether you live in Copenhagen or travel here for the training — you'll study in one of the world's most inspiring cities. Professional studio, fantastic infrastructure, and a lifestyle that enriches your practice.
en.cph_feat1_desc: The city is built for bikes — dedicated lanes, cycling traffic lights, and more freedom than a car could ever give.
en.cph_feat2_desc: World-class coffee bars on every corner — perfect for studying anatomy, journaling, or simply enjoying a break.
en.cph_feat3_desc: Nordic sauna rituals with aufguss masters — heat, breath, and community. The perfect complement to your practice.
en.cph_feat4_desc: Harbour baths and outdoor swimming year-round. Many yogis integrate cold exposure into their daily routine.
en.cph_feat5_desc: Home of the New Nordic cuisine. Street food, Torvehallerne, Michelin restaurants — fresh, seasonal, and plant-forward.
en.cph_feat6_desc: From furniture to architecture — beauty in every detail of everyday life. UNESCO's World Capital of Architecture.
en.cph_studio_desc: Our studio is located in one of Christianshavn's oldest buildings — over 400 years old. Centrally located with metro, restaurants, and green spaces within walking distance.
en.visit_title: Book a free studio tour in Christianshavn
en.visit_lead: Come by and feel the atmosphere — we'll show you around, answer everything, and help you figure out if it's the right fit. The tour takes about 20 minutes.
en.visit_list1: See the studios, equipment, and the calm of the space
en.visit_list3: Get a clear plan for your next step
en.visit_note: Not in Copenhagen? We can also do a short video tour via WhatsApp or FaceTime — perfect for international students.
en.visit_modal_subtitle: Choose a date and time that works for you.
en.visit_modal_fallback_link: Open booking in a new tab
en.reviews_lead: International and local students share their experience. From career changes to personal transformation — the training has changed the lives of 500+ people.
en.quote_text: Probably the best thing I have ever done for myself
en.quote_attribution_suffix: says the same thing at graduation
en.format_subtitle: 8 weeks with 3–4 training days per week. More immersive than our 18-week format, but with breathing room for everyday life — not the daily pace of a 4-week intensive.
en.format_card1_desc: Weekdays typically 10:00–17:00, selected weekends 09:00–17:00. On average 15–18 hours/week incl. self-practice and homework.
en.format_card2_desc: An intimate group where you're seen and heard. Individual feedback, personal guidance, and a community that supports you.
en.format_card3_desc: You can work part-time alongside. The pace gives you time to integrate and practice what you learn between sessions.
en.cohort_lead: We offer the 8-week semi-intensive program twice in 2026. Both cohorts provide identical Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certification and follow the same curriculum.
en.may_desc: The spring cohort — start your journey as the city blooms. Long bright days, outdoor living, and an amazing energy in Copenhagen.
en.june_desc: The summer cohort — Copenhagen at its best. Harbour baths, bright evenings, and the perfect time to experience the city alongside your training.
en.week_desc: Mon–Tue: Workshop (anatomy, asana, teaching) → Wed: Free — self-practice or daily life → Thu–Fri: Workshop (philosophy, pranayama, practice) → Weekend: Mix of practice and freedom.
en.cohort_point1: 200+ hours spread over 8 weeks with a balanced pace
en.cohort_point2: Same certification as the 4- and 18-week formats
en.cohort_point3: Perfect for a dedicated 2 months — locally or as a traveler
en.cohort_scenario1_text: The 8-week format is ideal if you live in the city and want to complete the training at a focused but balanced pace. You can maintain part-time work and social commitments.
en.cohort_scenario2_text: Many students travel here for the training. We help with accommodation near the studio, and 8 weeks gives you time to experience the city as more than a tourist.
en.cohort_cta_hint: Want to see the exact dates?
en.rooms_subtitle: For students traveling to Copenhagen, we offer furnished accommodation within walking distance of the studio in Christianshavn.
en.room1_desc: Fully furnished private apartment. Quiet, clean, and practical — everything you need for 8 weeks. Walking distance to the studio.
en.room2_desc: Private room in a 2-bedroom apartment. Shared kitchen and bathroom — perfect for meeting fellow students and making new friends.
en.rooms_cta_text: Learn more about accommodation and life in Copenhagen →
en.invest_include3: Practice in professional studio — heated + non-heated
en.invest_include5: Free studio classes throughout the training
en.invest_payment_note: The Preparation Phase fee of 3,750 kr. is included in the total price. Remaining: 21,750 kr. Fully refundable, no questions asked.
en.invest_ya_note: Yoga Alliance confirmation is only issued once all fees are paid in full.
en.early_title: Apply early — and start practicing right away
en.early_subtitle: The Preparation Phase secures your spot and gives immediate access to all classes at the studio.
en.early_list1: Secure your spot — max 12 per cohort
en.early_list2: Book and attend classes right away
en.early_list3: Get your body and mind ready before the training starts
en.early_list4: Pre-fill self-practice hours towards your 200 hours
en.early_cta_text: Start Preparation Phase and begin booking
en.faq1_q: Do I need experience to start?
en.faq1_a: You should have a minimum of 6–12 months of regular yoga practice (2–3 times per week). You should be comfortable with basic poses and able to sustain a 60-minute class. No teaching experience is required.
en.faq2_q: What is the weekly time commitment?
en.faq2_a: Expect approximately 15–18 hours per week, including classes (3–4 days), homework, self-practice, and preparation. More immersive than the 18-week, but with breathing room compared to the daily 4-week format.
en.faq3_q: Can I work alongside the training?
en.faq3_a: Yes, part-time. The program is designed so you can maintain part-time employment. Many students combine the training with 15–20 hours of work per week.
en.faq4_q: Can you help with accommodation in Copenhagen?
en.faq4_a: Yes — we offer furnished apartments near the studio for international students and trainees traveling to Copenhagen. From 6,500 DKK incl. everything.
en.faq5_q: I don't live in Denmark — is this relevant for me?
en.faq5_a: Absolutely. Many of our students fly in from abroad. Teaching is in Danish and English, we help with accommodation, and Copenhagen is one of the world's safest and most liveable cities.
en.faq6_q: What does it cost beyond the training?
en.faq6_a: The training is 25,500 kr. all-inclusive. Accommodation, food, and transport are extra. Expect approximately 8,000–14,000 kr./month for living costs in Copenhagen.
en.faq7_q: What happens if I get sick?
en.faq7_a: You may miss a maximum of 10% of the hours. We offer make-up sessions, and in extreme cases you can finish with the next cohort.
en.faq8_q: Is the training Yoga Alliance certified?
en.faq8_a: Yes, we are a registered Yoga Alliance school (RYS-200). You receive RYT-200 certification after graduation — recognized globally.
en.faq9_q: What's the difference between the 8-week and other formats?
en.faq9_a: All three formats (4, 8, and 18 weeks) provide identical Yoga Alliance RYT-200 certification. The 8-week is more immersive than the 18-week, but with better balance than the daily 4-week intensive program. Ideal if you can dedicate 2 focused months.
en.final_text: Next cohort starts May 2026 — max 12 spots. Get the schedule and take the first step.
en.more_lead: At Yoga Bible we offer programs that help you advance your practice — from targeted courses to flexible teacher trainings.
en.courses_desc: Every month we run focused 4-week programs packaged as 8 × 90-minute workshops (twice a week) — affordably priced and designed for anyone who wants to deepen their practice step by step.
